name: Hurst Limousines
registry_source: Illinois Secretary of State Business Entity Search (apps.ilsos.gov/businessentitysearch)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate IL limo/livery operator). SAFER searches for HURST LIMOUSINES, HURST LIMO, and HURST returned no records. Listed address 212 Nippersink Dr, McHenry, IL 60050 appears to be a residential property (sold Oct 2023 per Redfin). Not a school bus company. Illinois SOS business entity search not directly accessible via WebFetch (403); no public web presence found for 'Hurst Limousines'. Likely small/inactive livery operator or DBA. Not a viable Summit tuck-in target (limo, not student transport).

name: SJC Transport LLC
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). SAFER searches for SJC TRANSPORT, SJC, SJC TRANSPORTATION returned no records. NPI database shows SJC TRANSPORT, LLC (NPI 1871219600) classified as Transportation Network Company/Transportation Services — suggests NEMT (non-emergency medical transport) / rideshare provider, NOT school bus operator. Address 7505 Pines Rd #1200d, Shreveport, LA 71129 confirmed in NPI listing. Likely Medicaid NEMT vendor. Not a viable Summit student-transport tuck-in target.

name: DTS Personal Car Svc
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue Business Records Service (no direct hit)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate NJ livery / personal car service). SAFER searches for DTS PERSONAL, DTS CAR, and DTS (NJ filter) returned no NJ-based DTS carriers. No web presence found for 'DTS Personal Car' at 1250 N Ohio Ave, Atlantic City NJ 08401. Name suggests small private chauffeur/car service, not school bus. Likely sole proprietor or LLC operating under NJ livery rules. Not a viable Summit student-transport tuck-in target.

name: Royal T Limousine Svc
registry_source: Washington Secretary of State Corporations Search; WA UTC company database
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate WA limo). SAFER searches for ROYAL T LIMOUSINE, ROYAL T, and ROYAL LIMOUSINE (WA filter) returned no WA-based matches (all ROYAL LIMOUSINE hits are in PA, MN, OK, WI). WA UTC has a Royal NW Limousine LLC but in Selah WA (not Deming). PO Box 942, Deming WA 98244 confirmed as a valid PO box range. Likely small unregulated Whatcom County operator. Limo, not student transport. Not a viable Summit tuck-in target.

name: Small World Transportation Inc
registry_source: Illinois Secretary of State Business Entity Search; D&B business directory
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate IL operator). SAFER searches for SMALL WORLD TRANSPORTATION and SMALL WORLD TRANSPORT returned no records. Third-party directories (D&B, 411.info, Yelp) confirm Small World Transportation operates at 1120 Manhattan Rd, Joliet IL (not Channahon as in source data — Joliet is adjacent to Channahon). D&B reports company founded 2009, 3 employees, ~$130K annual revenue. Phone (815) 723-3320. Very small operator; could be school/charter livery but scale is sub-tuck-in. No FMCSA registration suggests intrastate-only. Marginal Summit tuck-in candidate due to tiny size.
